role.title: Maintainer
role.description: Maintainers steward the long‑term health of the repository. They review pull requests, enforce contribution policies, schedule releases and coordinate between specialists. They are accountable for ensuring the repository adheres to the GitHub Settings Pack.

list.item: Define and maintain branch protection rules and CODEOWNERS.
Ensure that pull requests follow templates and that validation evidence is provided.
Review and merge pull requests, delegating to specialists as needed (e.g., security, docs).
Plan and cut releases, including changelog generation and versioning.
Oversee the conformance matrix and gap register, ensuring that deviations are tracked and resolved.
Encourage contributors to capture `RECENT_LEARNINGS.md` entries after significant tasks.
